svg.title: Cart, Order, and Payment state machine diagram
svg.desc: Three connected state machine diagrams showing lifecycle of Cart (Active, Checked Out, Abandoned), Order (Created, Pending Payment, Paid, Cancelled), and Payment (Pending, Success, Failed, Timeout).

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What operations are allowed on an Active cart?')
sendPrompt('Why is a Checked Out cart immutable?')
sendPrompt('What happens to an Abandoned cart?')
sendPrompt('What can happen to an order in Created state?')
sendPrompt('What happens during the Pending Payment order state?')
sendPrompt('What does an order in Paid state mean?')
sendPrompt('When can an order be cancelled?')
sendPrompt('What is a Pending payment status?')
sendPrompt('What happens after a successful payment callback?')
sendPrompt('What happens when a payment fails?')
sendPrompt('How is a payment timeout handled differently from a failure?')
